sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_col DateTime, value Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT accurateCast(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_col) + value, 'UInt8') AS month_value FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, EXTRACT(DAY FROM date_col) AS day, accurateCast(value, 'Float64') AS accurate_value FROM test_dates WHERE value > 0;
SELECT id, date_col, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_col) / accurateCast(NULLIF(value, 0), 'UInt8') AS year_division FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY year_division;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num UInt8, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT n.num, accurateCast(n.num, 'Int8') + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM toDate('2023-01-01')) AS computed_value FROM test_numbers n WHERE n.description LIKE '%One%';
SELECT t.id, t.date_col, accurateCast(EXTRACT(SECOND FROM t.date_col), 'UInt8') AS seconds FROM test_dates t WHERE accurateCast(t.value, 'UInt8') > 0;

SELECT n.num, COUNT(*) AS num_count FROM test_numbers n JOIN (SELECT accurateCast(EXTRACT(DAY FROM date_col), 'UInt8') AS day_value FROM test_dates) d ON d.day_value = n.num GROUP BY n.num HAVING num_count > 1;
